name: dev-agent-teams
description: Multi-agent development pipeline: investigate → design → implement → review → PR

dashboardApp.title: Dashboard app directory
dashboardApp.description: Absolute path to a local clone of agent-workflow (https://github.com/naut1402/agent-workflow). Used by /dev-dashboard and local runner-cli.

dashboardHome.title: Dashboard registry home
dashboardHome.description: Directory for projects.json and runners.json. Default: ~/.dev-team-dashboard

dashboardServerUrl.title: Remote dashboard URL
dashboardServerUrl.description: Base URL of deployed dev-team-dashboard (e.g. https://dashboard.example.com). Leave empty for local-only.

dashboardApiToken.title: Remote dashboard API token
dashboardApiToken.description: Bearer token when remote dashboard requires auth.

dashboardProjectId.title: Default dashboard project id
dashboardProjectId.description: Default project id on remote dashboard for /dev-team-orchestrator --remote.
